title: Playing Cards and Tables
description: Adds playing cards and card tables to Minecraft
body:
**This datapack has a required resource pack, which can be downloaded from the page for the specific [version](https://modrinth.com/project/custom-cards/versions) you are installing!**

# Custom Playing Cards
This datapack adds a set of custom **playing cards** featuring Minecraft themed suits and the faces of the Hermits and other Minecrafters as the faces on various face cards and jokers. 

The base **Deck of Cards** is crafted with 6 `paper` and a `red_dye`, a `cyan_dye`, and any colored third `dye`. This gives a single item that contains 1 of each default card.  

![Crafting Recipe for Deck of Cards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bd64c047a0560c0ec217bbbfe0a30cc9cc616ef.gif)

The base **Deck** does not contain any Jokers. To get Jokers, create a **Joker Grab Bag** with 2 `paper`, a `red_dye`, a `cyan_dye`, and any colored third `dye`. This will give 4 grab bags, which can be opened by holding right click. 
Each grab bag contains a Cyan Joker, featuring a random Hermit that's not already included on the face cards, and a Red Joker, featuring a random player that responded to the feedback survey while creating this datapack.  

![Crafting Recipe for Joker Grab Bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6b2fd1e0824e18cc62c615c4b79c96b71c25096.gif)

To use these playing cards, you'll need to craft a **Card Table** - a special table that has 9 slots for placing playing cards. This is crafted with any `planks`, any colored `carpet`, and an `item_frame` in a stack. 

![Crafting recipe for a Card Table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7b9ae5ca46a36138e7f59788675e31ffee01bc6.gif)

## Controls

There are a handful of different ways to interact with Cards and the Card Table:

### Modifying Decks
- To shuffle a deck, hold *sneak* and *sprint*, then *right-click* the *air* with a *deck of cards*.
- To flip a deck, *sneak* and *right-click* the *air* with a *deck of cards*.

### Modifying the Card Table
- To disable a slot on the card table, *sneak* and *right-click* an *empty slot* with an *empty hand*.  
- To enable a slot on the card table, *stand* and *right-click* an *empty slot* with an *empty hand*.
- To change the rotation of the card table, *right-click* the *side* of the table with an *empty hand*.
- To break a table, *double left-click* the *side* of the table with an *empty hand*.

### Placing Cards
- To place a single card faceup, *stand* and *right-click* a *slot* with a *card* or a *deck*.
- To place a single card facedown, *sneak* and *right-click* a *slot* with a *card* or a *deck*.
- To place an entire deck faceup, *stand* and *left-click* a *slot* with a *deck*.
- To place an entire deck facedown, *sneak* and *left-click* a *slot* with a *deck*.

### Grabbing Cards
- To grab a single card to the mainhand, *stand* and *right-click* a *filled slot* with an *empty hand*.
- To grab an entire deck to the mainhand, *stand* and *left-click* a *filled slot* with an *empty hand*.
- To add a single card to the offhand, *sneak* and *right-click* a *filled slot* with an *empty hand* while the offhand is *empty* or contains a *deck* or a *card*. This will convert the offhand to a deck and add cards to the top.
- To add an entire deck to the offhand, *sneak* and *left-click* a *filled slot* with an *empty hand* while the offhand is *empty* or contains a *deck* or a *card*. This will convert the offhand to a deck and add cards to the top.

### Customizing Cards
- To change the face on a card, *sneak* and *right-click* a *slot* that contains a *face card* or *joker* with a *player head*.
